```json [{"bbox": [68, 66, 126, 90], "bbox": [68, 66, 126, 90], "category": "figure", "text": ""}, {"bbox": [813, 66, 930, 96], "category": "header", "text": "STUSB4500\nPin description"}, {"bbox": [67, 120, 252, 134], "category": "title", "text": "2.2.11 A_B_SIDE"}, {"bbox": [161, 137, 917, 165], "category": "text", "text": "This output pin provides the cable orientation. It is used to establish USB SuperSpeed signal routing. This signal is not required in case of USB 2.0 support."}, {"bbox": [438, 183, 656, 197], "category": "table_caption", "text": "Table 7. USB data MUX select"}, {"bbox": [164, 203, 927, 260], "category": "table", "text": "
ValueDescription
HiZCC1 pin is attached to CC line

"}, {"bbox": [67, 279, 310, 293], "category": "title", "text": "2.2.12 VBUS_VS_DISCH"}, {"bbox": [161, 296, 918, 324], "category": "text", "text": "This input pin is used to sense $V_{BUS}$ presence, monitor $V_{BUS}$ voltage, and discharge $V_{BUS}$ from the USB Type-C receptacle side."}, {"bbox": [161, 326, 882, 353], "category": "text", "text": "A serial resistor connected to the pin must be used to limit the discharge current through the pin. Maximum discharge current is 50 mA."}, {"bbox": [161, 355, 926, 383], "category": "text", "text": "The discharge is activated automatically during cable disconnection, transition to a lower PDO voltage, hard reset and error recovery state. The discharge time is programmable by NVM (see Section 5 Start-up configuration)."}, {"bbox": [67, 398, 256, 412], "category": "title", "text": "2.2.13 VREG_1V2"}, {"bbox": [161, 415, 874, 442], "category": "text", "text": "This pin is used only for external decoupling of the 1.2 V internal regulator. The recommended decoupling capacitor is: $1 \\mu F$ typ. ($0.5 \\mu F$ min., $10 \\mu F$ max.)"}, {"bbox": [67, 457, 214, 472], "category": "title", "text": "2.2.14 VSYS"}, {"bbox": [161, 475, 911, 515], "category": "text", "text": "This is the low power supply from the system, if there is any. It can be connected directly to a single cell Lithium battery or to the system power supply delivering 3.3 V or 5 V. It is recommended to connect the pin to ground when it is not used."}, {"bbox": [67, 530, 256, 544], "category": "title", "text": "2.2.15 VREG_2V7"}, {"bbox": [161, 547, 874, 575], "category": "text", "text": "This pin is used only for external decoupling of the 2.7 V internal regulator. The recommended decoupling capacitor is: $1 \\mu F$ typ. ($0.5 \\mu F$ min., $10 \\mu F$ max.)"}, {"bbox": [67, 590, 205, 604], "category": "title", "text": "2.2.16 VDD"}, {"bbox": [162, 607, 729, 622], "category": "text", "text": "This is the power supply from the USB power line for applications powered by $V_{BUS}$."}, {"bbox": [69, 973, 164, 984], "category": "footer", "text": "DS12499 - Rev 8"}, {"bbox": [873, 974, 930, 985], "category": "footer", "text": "page 9/42"}] ```
